facts.notes: FAIL attempt 1: top three emblems are cropped too aggressively; plants and bottom ornament are faithful, production layer is clean, but source fidelity requires a higher crop.

FAIL attempt 2: top-left star emblem still loses its upper point and the lower half of the yellow vine/tulip ornament is hidden by the final bottom band; plant rows are faithful and production layer is clean.

production.notes: PASS attempt 2: raw underlay has no old UI/text/glyph remnants and final overlay text/glyphs are readable; only source-fidelity crop issues remain.
